creator: hoek@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

The correct way to specify your spell program is through the "speller="  
option in .pinerc.  You may wish to add this to your system-wide .pinerc. 

/usr/local/etc/pine.conf 

Note that if you specify it as ispell, and then hold down ^T for a while, 
you can cause pine to die an unhealthy death if ispell (or whatever you 
specified) doesn't exist.
